visual_beats: Establishing shot: village eye dream worship, liminal apartment
False calm: hold on empty room

jumpscare_plan.volume_warning: 🔊 VOLUME WARNING — jumpscare at the end. Use headphones.
jumpscare_plan.creator_note: Finale scare — lunge on last beat, sting ~2s before end.

beat_sheet.visual: POV from driver's seat — car rolls to stop on wet two-lane road. Pine fog, abandoned gas station ahead. Headlights cut through mist.
beat_sheet.camera: Handheld micro-shake inside car, then push forward out the windshield

beat_sheet.visual: Step out — camera at chest height, walking toward pumps. Sodium streetlight FLICKERS orange. In the dark flash: Form 2 silhouette — too tall, wrong shoulders — at tree line.
beat_sheet.camera: Forward walk, never static, slight sway
beat_sheet.notes: Entity only visible when light dies

beat_sheet.visual: Light snaps OFF longer. Entity teleports one hop closer at road edge. Light ON — empty road for half a second — then shape still there, closer than before.
Gas station pumps pass in foreground. Flicker rate doubles. Form 2 stands dead center between pumps — frozen while light is on.
beat_sheet.camera: Orbit drift left, handheld horror movie

beat_sheet.visual: Entity raises one arm — slow creepy wave, wrist bent backward. Light OFF: entity jumps three meters forward in darkness. Light ON: now at pump #2, still waving.
Camera tries to pull back — entity mirrors retreat by stepping forward each time light dies. Closer every flicker cycle.
beat_sheet.audio_sfx: Rapid flicker bursts, breathing room tone

beat_sheet.visual: Entity fills center frame — head too high, joints wrong. Slow wave inches from camera. Face wrong but human-ish. Flicker sync: motion ONLY in black frames.
Streetlight dies completely for two seconds. Entity lunges from arm's length to lens distance in the dark.
beat_sheet.camera: Violent forward snap on light return

beat_sheet.visual: Final flicker — entity face fills frame, still mid-wave — CUT lunge with motion blur toward camera. Hard stop.
beat_sheet.camera: Impact rush, horror movie sting frame
